cloudtrail.description: AWS API call history — records every AWS Management Console action and API call

service.description: The AWS service that received the API call
service.format_hint: ALWAYS lowercase, NEVER with .amazonaws.com suffix. Parser strips domain automatically. Use 'iam' NOT 'IAM', 'Identity and Access Management', or 'iam.amazonaws.com'.

operation.description: The specific API action — maps to CloudTrail eventName
operation.format_hint: PascalCase, exactly as CloudTrail records it. Use 'CreateUser' NOT 'createuser', 'create_user', or 'Create User'.

operations.label: Export Table To Point In Time
Update Open ID Connect Provider Thumbprint
Restore DB Instance From DB Snapshot

outcome.description: Whether the API call succeeded or failed

actor.principal.description: The identity that performed the action (user ARN, email, service account, etc.)
actor.principal.format_hint: Exact match is case-sensitive. Use 'contains' for partial matching.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP address of the actor
actor.ip_address.format_hint: IPv4 or IPv6. Use 'starts_with' for CIDR-like matching (e.g. '10.0.').

actor.principal_type.description: Type of identity (user, role, service account, etc.)

actor.account_id.description: Cloud account or project ID of the actor

resource.uid.description: Unique identifier of the resource being accessed

resource.region.description: Cloud region where the resource resides

error_code.description: Error code when the operation failed (e.g. 'AccessDenied', 'Throttling')

azure_activity.description: Azure Resource Manager operations — records all ARM API calls across subscriptions

source_type.description: Always 'azure_activity' for Azure Activity Log rules

service.description: Azure resource provider extracted from operationName
service.format_hint: Lowercase, Microsoft. prefix removed. Parser extracts 'compute' from 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/write'. Use 'compute' NOT 'Microsoft.Compute' or 'Compute'.

operation.format_hint: Full ARM path with Microsoft. prefix, case-sensitive. Use 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write' NOT 'AssignRole'. Use 'starts_with' to match all operations of a resource type.

ungrouped_values.label: Sql: Create / Update Server Database Transparentdataencryption
Storage: Create / Update Storageaccount Blobservice Container
Web: Create / Update Site Function Key

outcome.description: Whether the API call succeeded or failed

actor.principal.description: The identity that performed the action (user ARN, email, service account, etc.)
actor.principal.format_hint: Exact match is case-sensitive. Use 'contains' for partial matching.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP address of the actor
actor.ip_address.format_hint: IPv4 or IPv6. Use 'starts_with' for CIDR-like matching (e.g. '10.0.').

actor.principal_type.description: Type of identity (user, role, service account, etc.)

actor.account_id.description: Cloud account or project ID of the actor

resource.uid.description: Unique identifier of the resource being accessed

resource.region.description: Cloud region where the resource resides

error_code.description: Error code when the operation failed (e.g. 'AccessDenied', 'Throttling')

gcp_audit.description: GCP Admin Activity and Data Access logs via Cloud Logging (protoPayload format)

source_type.description: Always 'gcp_audit' for GCP audit log rules

service.format_hint: Full googleapis.com name — NOT shortened. Use 'iam.googleapis.com' NOT 'iam', 'IAM', or 'Identity and Access Management'. Use 'compute.googleapis.com' NOT 'Compute Engine' or 'gce'.

operation.description: Full gRPC method name from protoPayload.methodName
operation.format_hint: Full gRPC path — case-sensitive. Use 'google.iam.v1.IAMPolicy.SetIamPolicy' NOT 'SetIamPolicy' or 'set_iam_policy'. Use 'contains' to match short names like 'SetIamPolicy' across all services.

outcome.description: Whether the API call succeeded or failed

actor.principal.description: The identity that performed the action (user ARN, email, service account, etc.)
actor.principal.format_hint: Exact match is case-sensitive. Use 'contains' for partial matching.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP address of the actor
actor.ip_address.format_hint: IPv4 or IPv6. Use 'starts_with' for CIDR-like matching (e.g. '10.0.').

actor.principal_type.description: Type of identity (user, role, service account, etc.)

actor.account_id.description: Cloud account or project ID of the actor

resource.uid.description: Unique identifier of the resource being accessed

resource.region.description: Cloud region where the resource resides

error_code.description: Error code when the operation failed (e.g. 'AccessDenied', 'Throttling')

oci_audit.description: OCI Audit logs — records all OCI API calls via data.eventType

service.description: OCI service namespace extracted from data.eventType (all segments except last)
service.format_hint: Reversed-domain format, all lowercase. Parser splits 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.CreateUser' → service='com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane', operation='CreateUser'. Use 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane' NOT 'IAM' or 'identity'.

operation.description: Last segment of OCI eventType (the operation name, PascalCase)
operation.format_hint: PascalCase, last segment of eventType. Parser extracts 'CreateUser' from 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.CreateUser'. Use 'CreateUser' NOT 'createuser' or 'create_user'.

outcome.description: Whether the API call succeeded or failed

actor.principal.description: The identity that performed the action (user ARN, email, service account, etc.)
actor.principal.format_hint: Exact match is case-sensitive. Use 'contains' for partial matching.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP address of the actor
actor.ip_address.format_hint: IPv4 or IPv6. Use 'starts_with' for CIDR-like matching (e.g. '10.0.').

actor.principal_type.description: Type of identity (user, role, service account, etc.)

actor.account_id.description: Cloud account or project ID of the actor

resource.uid.description: Unique identifier of the resource being accessed

resource.region.description: Cloud region where the resource resides

error_code.description: Error code when the operation failed (e.g. 'AccessDenied', 'Throttling')

ibm_activity.description: IBM Cloud audit logs in CADF format — records all IBM Cloud API calls
ibm_activity.log_format: JSON (CADF format — action, outcome, initiator, target)

source_type.description: Always 'ibm_activity' for IBM Activity Tracker rules

service.description: First segment of CADF action string, hyphens replaced with underscores
service.format_hint: Lowercase with underscores. Parser extracts 'iam_identity' from 'iam-identity.user-apikey.create'. Use 'iam_identity' NOT 'IAM', 'iam-identity', or 'Identity and Access Management'.

operation.description: Full IBM CADF action string (service.resource.verb format)
operation.format_hint: Full CADF action string with hyphens and dots — case-sensitive. Use 'iam-identity.user-apikey.create' NOT 'create' or 'CreateApiKey'. Use 'contains' or 'starts_with' for broader matches.

outcome.description: Whether the API call succeeded or failed

actor.principal.description: The identity that performed the action (user ARN, email, service account, etc.)
actor.principal.format_hint: Exact match is case-sensitive. Use 'contains' for partial matching.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP address of the actor
actor.ip_address.format_hint: IPv4 or IPv6. Use 'starts_with' for CIDR-like matching (e.g. '10.0.').

actor.principal_type.description: Type of identity (user, role, service account, etc.)

actor.account_id.description: Cloud account or project ID of the actor

resource.uid.description: Unique identifier of the resource being accessed

resource.region.description: Cloud region where the resource resides

error_code.description: Error code when the operation failed (e.g. 'AccessDenied', 'Throttling')

eks_audit.description: K8s API server audit events from AWS EKS, delivered via CloudWatch
eks_audit.log_format: JSON (CloudWatch batch of K8s audit events)

operation.description: Kubernetes API verb — maps to objectRef HTTP verb
operation.format_hint: Always lowercase. Read-only (get/list/watch) are filtered out by parser.

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP of the API caller

resource.name.description: Name of the specific K8s object

outcome.description: HTTP status code from responseStatus (as string)
outcome.format_hint: String representation of HTTP status code. Use 'starts_with' for ranges: '2' for 2xx, '4' for 4xx.

k8s_audit.description: Self-managed K8s API server audit events

actor.ip_address.description: Source IP of the API caller
